submit_idea_and_be_part: Submit your idea and be part of this innovation challenge
provide_contact_info: Please provide your contact information so we can reach you
describe_innovative_idea: Describe your innovative idea for this challenge
enter_concise_title: Enter a concise title for your idea
describe_idea_detail: Describe your idea in detail. What problem does it solve? How does it work?
what_impact_expected: What impact do you expect this idea to have?
strategic_analysis_description: Analyze the strategic value and market positioning of your idea
competitive_advantage_hint: Describe what makes your idea unique and better than existing solutions
market_potential_hint: Describe the market opportunity and potential for growth
resource_planning_description: Define the resources needed to implement your idea
human_resources_hint: Describe the human resources needed (team members, skills, expertise)
financial_resources_hint: Describe the financial resources required for implementation
technical_resources_hint: Describe the technical resources, tools, and infrastructure needed
team_implementation_description: Define your team and implementation plan
team_members_description: Add people who are involved in or affected by your idea
implementation_steps_description: Define the key steps to implement this idea
select_methodologies_used: Select the innovation methodologies you plan to use
review_submission_description: Please review all information before submitting your idea
idea_received_description: We have successfully received your idea and it will be reviewed by our team.
confirmation_sent_description: A confirmation email has been sent to {{email}}
whats_next_description: Our team will review your submission and contact you if we need any additional information. You will be notified about the status of your idea.
questions_contact: Have questions? Feel free to contact us for more information.
guest_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
title_required_at_least_one_language: Title is required in at least one language (Arabic or English)
description_required_at_least_one_langua: Description is required in at least one language (Arabic or English)
